channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Private space pilots are flying orbital missions for the US Space Force
item.description: True Anomaly and Rocket Lab are performing Top Gun-style satellite fly-bys for the US military.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, July 3 (game #1621)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, July 3 (game #1118)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, July 3 (game #852)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Meta has released an app for making generative AI games
item.description: Pocket is listed in app stores but seemingly unavailable in the US.

item.title: Uplift Parsons review: A dream standing desk that fits almost any workspace with elegance and ease
item.description: The Uplift Parsons is a fully customizable desk, from fairly compact to expansive, with more accessories and editable features than you'll know what to do with

item.title: This is the most incredible portable monitor setup you'll see — a portable L-shaped 16-inch triple-screen monitor is perfect for productivity
item.description: NexFold's Fold 7 transforms laptops into portable four-screen workstations using three folding 16-inch displays arranged creatively.

item.title: Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges over Texas crash that killed a woman inside her home
item.description: The man whose Tesla struck and killed a woman inside her Texas home last month is now facing manslaughter charges, as reported earlier by The Wall Street Journal and local news outlet KHOU 11. 44-year-old Michael Butler was arrested on Wednesday and claimed to have been driving his Model 3 using Tesla's Full-Self Driving (FSD) […]

item.title: Quote of the day by SpaceX CEO Elon Musk: 'Are you prepared to die? Then okay, you're a candidate' — a reminder that the manned mission to Mars might be a deadly one
item.description: The tech mogul has repeatedly called for the colonization of Mars, but has previously warned that early missions may carry monumental risks

item.title: The 11 best hi-fi upgrades of 2026 so far — we gave these speakers, turntables and DACs our highest marks after tough testing
item.description: From Sonos to Wharfedale to iFi — here are the highest-rated hi-fi and speaker upgrades we've tested

item.title: Thiel Capital’s Jack Selby nabs stakes in hot startups like Etched through Arizona connections
item.description: Selby's VC firm, Copper Sky Capital, is currently raising a $300 million second fund, according to a regulatory filing.

item.title: StubHub sued by World Cup fans over ticket cancellations
item.description: The lawsuit seeks to bar StubHub from selling World Cup tickets and give profits from sales to affected customers. After weeks of complaints from frustrated fans, StubHub is being sued by customers who say the ticket reseller’s inability to fulfill orders crushed their dreams of going to the World Cup.

item.title: Trump administration proposes rule to cut Medicare drug prices by $1.1 billion
item.description: The average older adult with Medicare Part B coverage who is administered one of these drugs would save $800 a year in co-payments. The Trump administration is proposing a new rule on Thursday to keep hospitals from charging markups on discounted drugs for Medicare patients and says that could save consumers $1.1 billion next year, according to estimates obtained by The Associated Press....

item.title: World Cup: The internet reacts to Team USA striker Folarin Baloguns red card
item.description: Everything you need to know about Folarin Balogun's red card and the internet's reaction.

item.title: Cloudflare will filter out web crawlers that serve AI companies
item.description: The hosting platform wants sites to have more control over how AI companies use their content.
